data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design principle focusing on making interactive elements easy to reach and use.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing decision-making complexity by simplifying choices for users.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Design elements following Gestalt principles for better user perception.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Design approach accounting for the limited span of attention.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leveraging users’ familiarity with common design patterns from other websites.
data.technical_spec: Consistency with Established Web Patterns, Familiar Interfaces
